pi_items.source: Task instruction file (task.json) explicitly requires navigating to this real domain.
Task instruction file (task.json) requires creating a bookmark with exactly this name.
Verified against task instructions and official DuckDuckGo v3 onion URL (duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion) via web search.
Task instructions and export_result.sh extraction script.
Verified URL encoding rule matching encodeURIComponent() logic acting on the target site URL.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Tor Browser javascript bookmarklet to search the current URL on DuckDuckGo's Onion service. It operates on real domains including DuckDuckGo's official v3 onion URL (duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion) and check.torproject.org, requiring output verification to exactly match standard URL encoding in the generated DDG URL prefix.
